name: databricks-okf
description: Semantic search over 6,000+ Databricks OKF concepts: ABAC, Delta Lake, MLflow, Unity Catalog, distributed training, serverless compute, and more.
long_description:
An MCP server backed by a pre-built Float32 embedding index over the Databricks OKF knowledge base. Run `dbokf-mcp index --okf-dir <path>` once to build the index, then install this bundle. Queries are ranked by cosine similarity in pure JS — no external database required.

Tested with perplexity/pplx-embed-v1-0.6b via OpenRouter.

tools.name: search_concepts
tools.description: Semantic search over 6,000+ Databricks concepts using vector similarity

tools.name: fetch_concept
tools.description: Get full markdown content of a concept by its ID

tools.name: search_by_tags
tools.description: Filter concepts where all specified tags match

tools.name: list_tags
tools.description: List all available tags in the knowledge base

llm_key.title: API Key
llm_key.description: OpenAI or OpenRouter API key (used for embedding search queries at runtime)

okf_dir.title: OKF Directory
okf_dir.description: Path to the Databricks OKF folder — must contain concepts/ and dbokf-index/ (run: dbokf-mcp index --okf-dir <path> first)

llm_base_url.title: API Base URL
llm_base_url.description: Custom endpoint URL (e.g. https://openrouter.ai/api/v1). Leave empty to use OpenAI.

llm_embedding_model.title: Embedding Model
llm_embedding_model.description: Model used for query embeddings — must match the model used at index time (stored in dbokf-index/config.json). Tested: perplexity/pplx-embed-v1-0.6b
